# Letta

> Letta is an open source framework for building stateful AI agents with persistent memory, tool execution, and multi-agent coordination.

## Complete Documentation Download

For the full documentation in a single file (guides, tutorials, concepts):
- **llms-full.txt**: https://docs.letta.com/llms-full.txt

This ~2MB file is ideal for:
- Uploading to Claude, ChatGPT, or other LLMs
- Local reference without scraping
- Building custom AI assistants with Letta knowledge

Note: API reference is not included in llms-full.txt (too large). Access specific endpoints via /api/.../index.md URLs.

Letta enables developers to create AI agents that remember context across conversations, manage their own memory through tool calls, and perform complex multi-step tasks. The framework provides a REST API and SDKs (Python, TypeScript) for building production agent applications.

Key capabilities:
- Persistent memory (in-context blocks + archival/RAG)
- Custom tool execution (sandbox, client-side, MCP)
- Multi-agent coordination patterns
- Streaming responses
- Human-in-the-loop workflows

## SDK Quick Reference

### TypeScript

```typescript
import { LettaClient } from "@letta-ai/letta-client";

// Initialize client (Cloud)
const letta = new LettaClient({ apiKey: "...", projectId: "..." });

// Create agent
const agent = await letta.agents.create({
  name: "my-agent",
  model: "openai/gpt-4o",
  embedding: "openai/text-embedding-3-small"
});

// Send message
const response = await letta.agents.messages.create(agent.id, {
  messages: [{ role: "user", content: "Hello!" }]
});

// Memory blocks
await letta.agents.blocks.create(agent.id, { label: "notes", value: "..." });
await letta.agents.blocks.update(agent.id, blockId, { value: "updated" });

// Custom tools
const tool = await letta.tools.create({ source_code: "def greet(name: str):\n    return f'Hello {name}'" });
await letta.agents.tools.attach(agent.id, tool.id);

// Folders (document storage)
const folder = await letta.folders.create({ name: "docs" });
await letta.agents.folders.attach(agent.id, folder.id);

// Archival memory (passages)
await letta.agents.passages.create(agent.id, { text: "Important fact...", tags: ["reference"] });
```

### Python

```python
from letta_client import Letta

# Initialize client (Cloud)
client = Letta(api_key="...", project_id="...")

# Create agent
agent = client.agents.create(
    name="my-agent",
    model="openai/gpt-4o",
    embedding="openai/text-embedding-3-small"
)

# Send message
response = client.agents.messages.create(
    agent_id=agent.id,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}]
)

# Memory blocks
client.agents.blocks.create(agent_id=agent.id, label="notes", value="...")
client.agents.blocks.update(agent_id=agent.id, block_id=block_id, value="updated")

# Custom tools
tool = client.tools.create(source_code="def greet(name: str):\n    return f'Hello {name}'")
client.agents.tools.attach(agent_id=agent.id, tool_id=tool.id)

# Folders (document storage)
folder = client.folders.create(name="docs")
client.agents.folders.attach(agent_id=agent.id, folder_id=folder.id)

# Archival memory (passages)
client.agents.passages.create(agent_id=agent.id, text="Important fact...", tags=["reference"])
```

## Model Handle Formats

| Provider | Format | Example |
|----------|--------|---------|
| OpenAI | `openai/{model}` | `openai/gpt-4o`, `openai/gpt-4o-mini` |
| Anthropic | `anthropic/{model}` | `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5` |
| Google | `google_ai/{model}` | `google_ai/gemini-2.5-pro` |
| Ollama (local) | `ollama/{model}` | `ollama/llama3.2` |
| OpenRouter | `openrouter/{model}` | `openrouter/anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet` |
| Custom endpoint | `openai/{model}` | Use with `model_endpoint` in model_settings |

## Memory System Overview

| Type | Location | Use Case |
|------|----------|----------|
| **Core memory blocks** | Always in context | Agent persona, user info, custom state |
| **Archival/passages** | Out of context, semantic search | Long-term facts, documents, RAG |
| **Folders/files** | Out of context, auto-attaches tools | Document storage, file management |
| **Conversation history** | Auto-managed | Chat history, auto-summarized on overflow |

## Common Patterns

### Custom Tools
- Imports MUST be inside function body (sandbox requirement)
- Use `request_heartbeat=True` return for multi-step operations
- Access secrets via `os.getenv()` after configuring tool variables

### Tool Variables (Secrets)
```python
# 1. Create tool variable
client.tools.variables.create(key="API_KEY", value="secret123", description="External API key")

# 2. Attach to tool
client.tools.variables.attach(tool_id=tool.id, key="API_KEY")

# 3. Access in tool code
def my_tool():
    import os
    api_key = os.getenv("API_KEY")
```

### Streaming
- Use `include_pings=True` for long operations (prevents Cloudflare timeout)
- Stream tokens arrive as `reasoning_message_delta` and `assistant_message_delta`

### Context Limits
- Default: 32K tokens
- Set `context_window_limit` in model_settings for custom models
- Enable compaction to auto-summarize when context fills

## SDK v1.0 Notes

| Aspect | Convention |
|--------|------------|
| Methods | `.update()` not `.modify()` |
| Constructor params | camelCase: `apiKey`, `projectId` |
| Payload params | snake_case: `agent_id`, `block_id` |
| Cloud requirement | `projectId` required in constructor |

## Agent Architecture Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `letta_v1_agent` | Current recommended. Native reasoning, direct messages. |
| `memgpt_v2_agent` | Legacy. Uses `send_message` tool, heartbeats. |

### Enable Sleeptime (Background Learning)
```python
client.agents.modify(agent_id=agent.id, enable_sleeptime=True)
```

## FAQ Quick Reference

**Get recent messages (newest first):**
```python
messages = client.agents.messages.list(agent_id=agent.id, order="desc", limit=10)
```

**Attach existing block to agent:**
```python
client.agents.blocks.attach(agent_id=agent.id, block_id=existing_block_id)
```

**Create conversation (multi-session):**
```python
conv = client.conversations.create(agent_id=agent.id)
response = client.agents.messages.create(agent_id=agent.id, conversation_id=conv.id, messages=[...])
```

## Accessing Full Content

Append `/index.md` to any documentation URL to get the canonical LLM-friendly markdown version. Authored docs pages also support `/page.md` aliases. For example:
- `https://docs.letta.com/guides/build-with-letta/quickstart` -> `https://docs.letta.com/guides/build-with-letta/quickstart/index.md`
- `https://docs.letta.com/guides/build-with-letta/quickstart.md`

API reference pages keep the existing `/api/.../index.md` pattern.

## Getting Started

- [Quickstart](https://docs.letta.com/guides/build-with-letta/quickstart/index.md): Build your first Letta agent in minutes
- [Core Concepts](https://docs.letta.com/core-concepts/index.md): Understanding agents, memory, and tools
- [Prompts](https://docs.letta.com/prompts/index.md): System prompt configuration and best practices

## Agents

- [Agent Overview](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/overview/index.md): Creating and configuring agents
- [Context Hierarchy](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/context-hierarchy/index.md): How agent context is structured
- [Multimodal](https://docs.letta.com/multimodal/index.md): Image and vision support
- [JSON Mode](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/json-mode/index.md): Structured output responses
- [Multi-agent Overview](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/multi-agent/index.md): Coordinating multiple agents
- [Conversations](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/conversations/index.md): Multi-conversation support per agent
- [Agent File](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/agent-file/index.md): YAML-based agent definitions

## Memory

- [Memory Overview](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/memory/index.md): How agent memory works
- [Memory Blocks](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/memory-blocks/index.md): In-context editable memory segments
- [Shared Memory](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/multi-agent-shared-memory/index.md): Sharing blocks across agents
- [Archival Memory](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/archival-memory/index.md): Long-term searchable storage
- [Archival Search](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/archival-search/index.md): Querying archival memory
- [Archival Best Practices](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/archival-best-practices/index.md): Optimizing archival usage
- [Context Engineering](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/context-engineering/index.md): Optimizing context window usage
- [Compaction](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/context-engineering/index.md): Message summarization settings

## Tools

- [Tools Overview](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/tools/index.md): Adding capabilities to agents
- [Base Tools](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/base-tools/index.md): Built-in memory and utility tools
- [Custom Tools](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/custom-tools/index.md): Creating Python tool functions
- [Prebuilt Tools](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/prebuilt-tools/index.md): Web search, code execution, etc.
- [Web Search](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/web-search/index.md): Internet search capabilities
- [Run Code](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/run-code/index.md): Code execution in sandbox
- [Tool Rules](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/tool-rules/index.md): Controlling tool execution order
- [Tool Variables](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/tool-variables/index.md): Injecting runtime data into tools

## Tool Execution Modes

- [Execution Overview](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/tool-execution-overview/index.md): Comparing execution modes
- [Sandbox Execution](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/tool-execution-sandbox/index.md): Secure cloud execution (default)
- [Client-side Tools](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/tool-execution-client-side/index.md): Local execution via SDK
- [MCP Execution](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/tool-execution-mcp/index.md): Model Context Protocol tools
- [Built-in Tools](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/tool-execution-builtin/index.md): Memory and composio tools
- [Local Execution](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/tool-execution-local/index.md): Self-hosted server execution

## Model Context Protocol (MCP)

- [MCP Overview](https://docs.letta.com/guides/mcp/overview/index.md): What is MCP and why use it
- [MCP Setup](https://docs.letta.com/guides/mcp/setup/index.md): Configuring MCP servers
- [Remote MCP](https://docs.letta.com/guides/mcp/remote/index.md): SSE-based remote servers
- [Local MCP](https://docs.letta.com/guides/mcp/local/index.md): stdio-based local servers

## Multi-Agent Patterns

- [Supervisor-Worker](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/multi-agent-supervisor-worker/index.md): Coordinating specialized workers with shared memory
- [Parallel Execution](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/multi-agent-parallel-execution/index.md): Running agents concurrently
- [Producer-Reviewer](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/multi-agent-producer-reviewer/index.md): Iterative refinement workflow
- [Round Robin](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/multi-agent-round-robin/index.md): Distributing work evenly across agents
- [Hierarchical Teams](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/multi-agent-hierarchical-teams/index.md): Multi-layer coordination with executives, managers, workers

## Streaming & Responses

- [Streaming](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/streaming/index.md): Real-time token streaming
- [Message Types](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/message-types/index.md): Understanding response structure
- [Messages](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/messages/index.md): Working with conversation history
- [Human-in-the-Loop](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/human-in-the-loop/index.md): Tool approval workflows
- [Long Running](https://docs.letta.com/guides/agents/long-running/index.md): Background task execution

## Deployment

- [Letta API Overview](https://docs.letta.com/guides/api/overview/index.md): Managed cloud service
- [API Keys](https://docs.letta.com/guides/api/letta-api-key/index.md): Authentication setup
- [Custom LLM Keys](https://docs.letta.com/guides/api/custom-keys/index.md): Bring your own model keys
- [Docker Deployment](https://docs.letta.com/guides/server/docker/index.md): Self-hosted with Docker
- [Railway](https://docs.letta.com/guides/server/railway/index.md): One-click cloud deployment
